objective: Understand and implement SQL aggregate functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX) and apply grouping operations using GROUP BY and HAVING clauses to generate summarized reports from relational databases.
learningObjectives: Understand the concept and usage of SQL aggregate functions
Use COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, and MAX functions effectively
Implement GROUP BY clause for grouping rows based on column values
Apply HAVING clause to filter grouped results
Differentiate between WHERE and HAVING clauses
Write complex SQL queries combining aggregate functions with grouping operations
Analyze and summarize data from relational databases
expectedOutcomes: Write SQL queries using various aggregate functions
Group data using GROUP BY clause
Filter grouped data using HAVING clause
Generate meaningful reports and summaries from database tables
Understand the practical applications of aggregate functions in real-world scenarios
